query: UPDATE users SET hasRegistered = 1 WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND email != '';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute UPDATE users SET hasRegistered = 1 WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND email != '';
